Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Apr-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Continued To Apr-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for (petitioner) San Francisco Public Administrator. Rodel Rodis for Mr. Bacdayan.

Ms. Shomer stated that this appears to be bifurcated as to the accounting issues and the threshold issues, that Mr. Rodis provided her with a copy of a petition to review, that he had attempted to e-file it, that she has not had time to file a response and that she thought they could address all of the issues with an amended petition. Mr. Rodis stated that he concurs, that Ms. Shomer's predecessor has requested that proposals be submitted regarding the trust, that Mr. Bacdayan proposed a foundation that would benefit the children of that region, that there was much discussion as to how it would take place, that he has tried to e-file his petition, that he has requested assistance from Rowena Navia in drafting a trust and that he plans to submit the trust and petition at the next hearing. Ms. Shomer stated that they will need a 60 day continuance. The Court asked if responses to the examiner's notes could be filed in 3 weeks. Ms. Shomer stated that if the new petition proposes Mr. Bacdayan she was hoping to amend her petition to include the responses but agreed to do so separately. The accounting petition was continued to April 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status on filing responses to the examiner's notes is set for March 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Interim Account And Report
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Persons Or Entities Entitled To Distribution Of Testamentary Trust & Petn. For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for (administrator) San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Shomer reported that she left a message for Mr. Rodas regarding this hearing and that after the last hearing Mr. Rodas said he would be associating in counsel who would prepare the petition. The Court asked if anything could be accomplished today without Mr. Rodas. Ms. Shomer stated that the first account has been filed. A recess was taken to allow time for Mr. Rodas to appear. The Court stated that we are back on the record and there is no appearance by Mr. Rodas and asked the Public Administrator why we shouldn't take their petition off calendar and set a date for Mr. Bacdayan to file his petition. Ms. Shomer stated that Mr. Rodis' client appears to be a suitable beneficiary but is concerned regarding the issue of getting information before the court. The Court stated that it will take the Public Administrator's petition to determine persons or entities entitled to distribution, etc., off calendar, set a status date for a petition to be filed by Mr. Bacdayan of November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and stated that if that petition is not on file it will need a petition and prayer from the Public Administrator. Ms. Shomer is to contact Mr. Rodis regarding the November 30, 2015 date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Interim Account And Report
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for the (administrator) San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA). Rodel Rodis for Albert Bacdayan.

The Court stated that an interim accounting is needed. Ms. Shomer reported that as they were preparing the accounting they found assets that needed to be corrected on the inventory and appraisal, that they have filed the corrected inventory and appraisal, that the accounting needs to reflect the current status of the estate, that per the probate examiner the accountings can only be done in 2-year increments and asked if there was some other type of document that could be filed. The Court stated that the interim accounting needs to be done and that in regards to the matter of distribution the SFPA will either need to amend their petition or Mr. Bacdayan will need to petition for trustee. Ms. Shomer requested that Mr. Bacgayan file a petition and that they could file a declaration in support of it. Mr. Rodis stated that he will file the petition and that he would like it heard on the continuance date for the accounting status. Mr. Rodis was advised to file his petition and that the accounting matter could be continued to that date. The status on filing an interim accounting and the petition to determine persons or entities entitled to distribution of testamentary trust, etc., were continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Interim Account And Report
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathon Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Guardian. Anthony Luna specially appearing on behalf of Rodel Rodis for (Applicant) Dr. Albert Bacdayan.

Mr. Ferdon reported that he responded to the examiner's notes, that Dr. Bacdayan is interested in establishing a trust, that they had previously tried various entities and services regarding indigenous groups in the Philippines, that Dr. Bacdayan is a college professor from the East Coast, would like to close the estate and distribute to the trust, that Dr. Bacdayan thinks others will contribute once the trust is established and would like a 60 day continuance for Mr. Rodis, Dr. Bacdayan and the school to draft the trust documents. Mr. Luna is in agreement with Mr. Ferdon. The status on filing first interim accounting and the Petition to Determine Persons or Entities Entitled to Distribution, etc., were continued to July 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Yeung. (Not Reported)
